result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-validate [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  package  Validates NuGet package health. Ensures your package meets the .NET Foundation's guidelines for secure packages.

Usage:

Options:

result.stdout:
Description:
  A local package

Usage:
  dotnet-validate package local <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  Package to validate.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

Usage:

Arguments:

result.stdout:
Description:
  A package on a NuGet Feed

Usage:
  dotnet-validate package remote <packageId> [options]

Arguments:
  <packageId>  Package Id

Options:
  -v, --version <version>                                Package version. Defaults to latest.
  -d, --nuget-config-directory <nuget-config-directory>  The directory from where the NuGet configuration is loaded. This is used to automatically detect NuGet package sources and the location of the global‑packages directory. Defaults to the current directory.
  -?, -h, --help                                         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  A package on a NuGet Feed

Usage:
  dotnet-validate package remote <packageId> [options]

Arguments:
  <packageId>  Package Id

Options:
  -v, --version <version>                                Package version. Defaults to latest.
  -d, --nuget-config-directory <nuget-config-directory>  The directory from where the NuGet configuration is loaded. This is used to automatically detect NuGet package sources and the location of the global‑packages directory. Defaults to the current directory.
  -?, -h, --help                                         Show help and usage information
